# aikido_domains (Data Source)

Lists all domains in the Aikido workspace.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "aikido_domains" "all" {}

output "domains" {
  value = [for d in data.aikido_domains.all.domains : "${d.id}: ${d.domain} (${d.kind})"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `domains` (Attributes List) The list of domains. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--domains))

<a id="nestedatt--domains"></a>
### Nested Schema for `domains`

Read-Only:

- `domain` (String) The domain name.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the domain.
- `kind` (String) The type of domain (front_end, rest_api, graphql_api, hosted).
